docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED SERVED FEB-04-2009, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT TAM, ELAINE
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED JUN-01-2009 ORDERED DESTROYED
STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE JUDGE PRO TEM QUEENA HO FILED BY PHILLIPS, SARA TAM, ELAINE
STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE JUDGE PRO TEM QUEENA HO FILED BY PHILLIPS, SARA TAM, ELAINE
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-05-2009 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF PHILLIPS, SARA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT TAM, ELAINE $425.00 PRINCIPAL, $50.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $475.00, IF DEFENDANT ELAINE TAM HAD COMPLIED WITH CIVIL CODE 1950.5, THEN DEFENDAT ELAINE TAM WOULD HAVE BEEN ENTITLED TO WITHHOLD DEPOSIT FOR THE SCREEN ($50.00), REFRIGERATOR ($25.00), AND CARPET ($200.00.) HOWEVER, BECAUSE ELAINE TAM DID NOT COMPLY WITH 1950.5 DESPITE SEVERAL REQUESTS BY PLAINTIFF, ELAINE TAM IS ORDERED TO REFUND $425.00 TO PLAINTIFF. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT TAM, ELAINE
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,725.00 FILED BY PHILLIPS, SARA AS TO DEFENDANT TAM, ELAINE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-05-2009 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAR-05-2009 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAR-05-2009 BY JUDGE PRO TEM: QUEENA HO. APPEARANCES BY BOTH PARTIES. EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506).
